title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
summary: Google Cloud announced new features in Looker including dashboard agents that automate workflows and insights, conversational analytics, and semantic model evolutions. The platform grounds AI in a governed semantic layer to enable business intelligence in the agentic era.
writeup: This video covers new Looker features from Google Cloud, including dashboard agents that automate workflows and surface insights, conversational analytics, and updates to the semantic model. The central design choice is grounding AI in a governed semantic layer, which keeps agent outputs tied to defined metrics and access controls. The takeaway: these additions extend business intelligence into the agentic era while preserving governance, aimed at making analytics accessible to business users.
